Uses of Package
io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.api

Packages that use io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.api
Package
Description
io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.api
User-facing extension points for building cluster-aware partitioned jobs.
io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition
Master-side partitioning.
  • Classes in io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.api used by io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.api
    Class
    Description
    ClusterAwareAggregatorCallback
    A callback interface to be implemented by classes that need to react to the successful completion or failure of a collection of Spring Batch partitioned step executions in a clustered environment.
    PartitionStrategy
    A builder class for configuring the partitioning strategy in a Spring Batch clustered environment.
  • Classes in io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.api used by io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition
    Class
    Description
    PartitionStrategy
    A builder class for configuring the partitioning strategy in a Spring Batch clustered environment.
